hooks.statusMessage: Running tests, typecheck, and lint before commit...
hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' | grep -q 'git commit' || exit 0; bun test && bun typecheck && bun lint || { echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"deny","permissionDecisionReason":"CI checks failed — fix errors before committing"}}'; exit 2; }
